'''Kelliadu''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Eriadu system/Legends|Eriadu system]], located in the [[Seswenna sector/Legends|Seswenna sector]] of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Along with the rest of its [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the planet was located on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace routes]] known as the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], the [[Lipsec Run/Legends|Lipsec Run]], the [[Nothoiin Corridor]], the [[Rimma Trade Route/Legends|Rimma Trade Route]], the [[Senex Trace]], and the [[Yankirk Route]].<ref name="TEA" />

Kelliadu had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]] and was the sixth planet that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Eriadu (star)|Eriadu]]. The world featured an [[Water/Legends|icy]] surface and a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] climate.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kelliadu was first mentioned in ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'', a [[2004]] sourcebook for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', published by [[Wizards of the Coast]].<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> The [[2009]] book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the world in grid square M-18.<ref name="TEA" />
